title: ERP Customer / Retailer Master — Bronze Source Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating raw ERP customer and retailer master data from daily CSV files before ingestion into brz_freshsip.erp_customers_raw. SCD Type 2 history is applied in the Silver layer.

retailer_id.description: Unique FreshSip retailer account identifier; business key for SCD Type 2 in Silver

retailer_name.description: Legal business name of the retailer

retail_segment.description: Segment classification for the retailer account

channel.description: Distribution channel through which this retailer is served

region.description: US geographic region of the retailer's primary operations

state.description: US state code of the retailer's primary location

city.description: City of the retailer's primary location; informational

credit_terms_days.description: Net payment terms in days; cast to INTEGER in Silver; standard values are 15, 30, 45, 60, 90

account_activation_date.description: Date the retailer account was first activated in ERP; used for CAC calculation window; cast to DATE in Silver

account_status.description: Current status of the retailer account

trade_spend_usd.description: Trade spend allocated to this account for the current ERP period in USD; used for CAC calculation; cast to DECIMAL in Silver

broker_commission_usd.description: Broker commission paid for this account in the current period in USD; cast to DECIMAL in Silver

field_sales_cost_usd.description: Field sales cost allocated to this account in the current period in USD; cast to DECIMAL in Silver

record_effective_date.description: Date from which this version of the customer record is effective; required for SCD Type 2 processing in Silver
